name: l2_powered_hover_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverValidation compares powered L2 force/moment output against the static baseline plus hover actuator-disk delta.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-hover run validation.

name: l2_powered_hover_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverExperimentPlan supplies the static-airframe request and hover force/moment target paired by preset.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-hover run validation.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies the hover force/moment delta expected from powered source terms.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-hover run validation.

name: l2_bridge_force_moment
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge.L2ForceMomentSample is the compact live L2 output shape consumed by this validator.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-hover run validation.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-hover run validation.

name: delta_validation
value: Validation target compares powered L2 force/moment output against the static-airframe baseline plus hover actuator-disk delta; use only after a real A4MC powered source-term request is available.
note: The validator subtracts static-airframe force/moment before applying force moment and equivalent center-of-force tolerances.
